CATEGORY_ALREADY_EXISTS: A category with this name already exists.
CATEGORY_DEPENDENCY_ERROR: This category is used by some transactions.
CATEGORY_OWNERSHIP_VIOLATION: This category does not belong to the current user.
CATEGORY_SYSTEM_NAME_CONFLICT: This category name is reserved by a system category. Choose a different name.
SYSTEM_CATEGORY_DELETION_NOT_ALLOWED: Deleting a system category is not allowed.
SYSTEM_CATEGORY_HAS_OWNER: Invalid category state. A system category should not have an owner.
SYSTEM_CATEGORY_NOT_ALLOWED: This system category is not allowed in a standard transaction.
SYSTEM_CATEGORY_UPDATE_NOT_ALLOWED: Updating a system category is not allowed.
SYSTEM_CATEGORY_WRONG_TYPE: Invalid category state. This category should be a system category.
USER_CATEGORY_MISSING_OWNER: Invalid category state. User category is missing an owner.
